name: get_option_positions
description: List options positions for an account. Returns open and closed (zero-quantity) positions. Pass nonzero=true for "what options do I have" / "show me my positions" — the common case.

account_number.description: Brokerage account number. Must come from the user or be clearly implied — never default from get_accounts.

nonzero.description: True to return only currently-open positions; omit/false to include closed ones.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor. Omit for the first page; for the next page, pass the cursor query param from the prior response's next URL.
